Title: Dai gosan!! Ginyû ga kaeru ni natchatta
Actors: Masako Nozawa, Brice Armstrong, Laura Bailey
Plot: Captain Ginyu, back in his own body, allows Vegeta to pound on him until he is ready to attempt another body switch, but Goku has other plans; afterward, everyone prepares to fight Frieza. Meanwhile, Frieza continues to beat on Nail.
